_meta.description: Canonical, exhaustive registry for all Koda data banks. Single source of truth for loading, validation, dependency resolution, environment gating, schema enforcement, and ChatGPT-parity behavioral guarantees.

tests.assert: no two banks share the same path
no two banks share the same id
all banks requiredByEnv.production=true are present and enabled
every enabled bank has a valid schemaId
no bank depends on a category loaded after its own
